name: TruGolf Holdings, Inc.
business: TruGolf is a golf technology company focused on indoor golf simulation hardware, software, and related services. We offer a portfolio of golf technology products designed to help users play, improve, and enjoy golf in indoor environments, including launch monitors, simulator systems, and simulation software. Our products serve residential, commercial, and franchise-oriented indoor golf markets.
sellsTo: golf courses including pro shops and private clubs
golf facilities seeking technology-enabled driving range solutions

exposures.sentence: TruGolf is a golf technology company focused on indoor golf simulation hardware, software, and related services.
We also offer Multi-Sport Arcade, an interactive sports and entertainment add-on designed to expand simulator use beyond golf.
Our failure to prevent security breaches could damage our reputation and brands and substantially harm our business and results of operations.

tamClaims.claim: According to Grand View Research, the global golf simulator market was valued at approximately $1.74 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 9.4% from 2025 to 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Grand View Research, the global golf simulator market was valued at approximately $1.74 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 9.4% from 2025 to 2030.
